focus_area: Vertical AI for Gaming / Interactive Entertainment

partner.name: Nick Tuosto
partner.title: Co-Founder & Managing Partner
partner.background: Former Goldman Sachs TMT, co-founded LionTree's gaming practice

thesis_alignment.summary: Griffin is the largest VC fund dedicated exclusively to gaming. They understand that AI is transforming game development, player engagement, and live ops. Nick Tuosto's Goldman/LionTree background brings serious financial firepower to gaming bets.
relevant_expertise: Pure-play gaming focus — no distractions
Deep LP network including major game publishers
Understanding of AI in game development pipelines
Series A/Growth expertise for scaling game companies

outreach_strategy.hook: Griffin understands gaming better than any other fund. Position as the AI infrastructure layer specifically built for game developers — procedural content, AI NPCs, live ops automation.
key_talking_points: Reference Scopely's AI-driven live ops success
Emphasize developer-first approach to AI tooling

fund.name: Lightspeed Venture Partners (Gaming)
fund.location: Menlo Park, CA / San Francisco, CA

partner.name: Amy Wu
partner.title: Partner, Gaming & Consumer
partner.background: Former FTX Ventures, led $2B gaming fund, extensive crypto/gaming crossover experience

thesis_alignment.summary: Amy Wu built FTX Ventures' $2B gaming practice before returning to Lightspeed. She understands the intersection of gaming, crypto, and AI better than almost any investor. Lightspeed's gaming portfolio spans traditional and Web3 gaming.
relevant_expertise: Deep expertise in gaming + crypto + AI convergence
Former head of FTX Ventures $2B gaming fund
Lightspeed's Epic Games investment shows big-ticket capability
Strong Asia gaming network (China, Korea, Japan)

outreach_strategy.angle: AI infrastructure for the next generation of interactive entertainment
outreach_strategy.hook: Amy's experience at FTX Ventures gave her unique insight into Web3 gaming's infrastructure gaps. Position as solving the AI infrastructure problem for both traditional and Web3 game developers.
key_talking_points: Reference Epic Games' Unreal Engine + AI trajectory
Mention understanding of Web3 gaming infrastructure needs
warm_paths: Web3 gaming founders in Lightspeed portfolio

partner.name: Shanti Bergel
partner.title: Managing Director
partner.background: Former COO of Tilting Point, 15+ years in gaming operations and investment

thesis_alignment.summary: Transcend is purpose-built for gaming — operators who became investors. Shanti Bergel's Tilting Point background means deep understanding of game publishing, user acquisition, and live ops. They get the operational side of gaming AI.
relevant_expertise: Operators-first approach — all partners built game companies
Deep live ops and UA expertise from Tilting Point
Understanding of AI for player retention and monetization
Strong indie developer network

outreach_strategy.angle: AI for game operations and player engagement
outreach_strategy.hook: Transcend's operator background means they understand that AI isn't just about content generation — it's about running better live ops, smarter UA, and more engaging player experiences.
key_talking_points: Reference Tilting Point's data-driven publishing model
Mention AI for player segmentation and personalization
Emphasize operational AI vs. creative AI distinction

partner.name: Luke Alvarez
partner.title: Managing Partner & Founder
partner.background: Former CEO of Inspired Gaming Group (IPO), founded Innovate Gaming, 20+ years gaming entrepreneurship

thesis_alignment.summary: Hiro Capital focuses on games, metaverse, and esports with a European base and global reach. Luke Alvarez's public company background brings institutional discipline to gaming bets. Strong emphasis on sports, racing, and simulation games.
relevant_expertise: European gaming network with US presence
Sports/esports specialization
Public markets experience (IPO, M&A)
Metaverse and spatial computing thesis

outreach_strategy.angle: AI for immersive and spatial gaming experiences
outreach_strategy.hook: Hiro's focus on metaverse and spatial computing aligns with AI-generated immersive environments. Position as infrastructure for the next generation of 3D/social gaming.
key_talking_points: Reference Everywhere's ambition for player-created worlds
Mention AI for procedural 3D environment generation

partner.name: Paul Leydon
partner.title: Investment Partner
partner.background: Former CPO at Scopely, led product for games generating $1B+ revenue, deep mobile F2P expertise

thesis_alignment.summary: Aonic is the new gaming fund from ex-Scopely executives who scaled mobile games to billions. Paul Leydon's CPO experience means deep understanding of product-market fit, monetization, and retention. They understand AI for F2P game operations intimately.
relevant_expertise: Ex-Scopely product leadership ($1B+ game experience)
Deep mobile F2P and live ops expertise
Understanding of AI for monetization optimization
Nordic/European gaming ecosystem access

outreach_strategy.angle: AI for mobile F2P game operations and monetization
outreach_strategy.hook: Paul's Scopely background means he knows exactly how AI can transform live ops, player segmentation, and monetization in mobile games. Position as the operational AI layer for F2P gaming.
key_talking_points: Reference Scopely's data-driven live ops success
Mention AI for offer personalization and player LTV optimization
